prompt: Use the elevation map as a height-map to emboss the letters, with high points raised and low points recessed.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1 (the 'PUMA' text) by applying an embossed effect to the letters. Use Image 2 (the grayscale elevation map) as a height-map: ensure that the lighter areas of Image 2 correspond to raised, higher points on the letters, and the darker areas correspond to recessed, lower points.
objects: raised areas on the letters corresponding to lighter parts of the grayscale map
recessed areas on the letters corresponding to darker parts of the grayscale map
surface texture on the letters reflecting the contours of the grayscale elevation map
